mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(user_number) FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'C'

SELECT u.user_id, u.user_nickname, u.user_name, u.user_phone,u.user_birth,u.user_email, c.common_report_count FROM ddd_user u JOIN ddd_user_common c ON u.user_number = c.user_number WHERE u.user_number = #{userNumber}
SELECT COUNT(user_number) FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'S'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT u.user_number, u.user_id, s.shelter_name, u.user_phone, u.user_email, s.shelter_certification FROM ddd_user u JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON u.user_number = s.user_number WHERE u.user_type = 'S' ORDER BY s.shelter_certification ASC, u.user_number DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT u.user_id, s.shelter_name, u.user_nickname, s.shelter_address, s.shelter_business_number, s.shelter_certification FROM ddd_user u JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON u.user_number = s.user_number WHERE u.user_number = #{userNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_user_shelter SET shelter_certification = 'Y' WHERE user_number = #{userNumber}
